title: clematis ibarensis subsp. edentata
intro: Clematis ibarensis subsp. edentata is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family, known for its beautiful white flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Clematis ibarensis subsp. edentata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in the form of extracts and tinctures.
